'''H'nib Statermast''' was the [[Filvian]] proprietor of the [[Farrimmer Cafe]] aboard the [[Mynock 7 Space Station]].

==Biography==
A retired [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], he had traded his [[Light freighter/Legends|stock light freighter]] for ownership of the cafe. He took on [[Grosteek]] as his partner in the business, splitting the profits 65/35. After a while, he felt like returning to his spacefaring ways, but didn't want abandon his business. He kept his eyes open for a possible investor to sell his share of the restaurant to. He had visited many planets, including Tatooine. He particularly liked desert worlds.<ref name="AJ11" />

==Personality and traits==
Statermast was amiable and liked to converse with his clientele, but was reserved with people who simply wanted information and didn't buy anything.<ref name="AJ11" />
